This page was generated using data obtained on 2023-09-22. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.
  • wikipedia tag unexpected language
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q104842021 vs Q74035008
Cyrus Dallin Art Museum - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q85769981 vs Q49505357
Irish Famine Memorial - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q48976508 vs Q7282768
Rag & Bone - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q51159992 vs Q48989618
Holyoke Dam - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q4796161 vs Q43664903
Arrowhead - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(456710478)['wikidata'='Q104842021']['wikipedia'='en:Cyrus Dallin Art Museum']; node(4846396741)['wikidata'='Q85769981']['wikipedia'='en:Irish Famine Memorial']; node(7503880213)['wikidata'='Q48976508']['wikipedia'='en:Rag & Bone']; way(43912518)['wikidata'='Q51159992']['wikipedia'='en:Holyoke Dam']; way(612401199)['wikidata'='Q4796161']['wikipedia'='en:Arrowhead (Herman Melville House)']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
brand:wikidata and brand:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because brand:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q8040120 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Wyndham Hotels and Resorts to en:Wyndham Hotels & Resorts
Travelodge - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q8040120 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Wyndham Hotels and Resorts to en:Wyndham Hotels & Resorts
La Quinta - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( way(214628168)['operator:wikidata'='Q8040120']['operator:wikipedia'='en:Wyndham Hotels and Resorts']; way(29821980)['operator:wikidata'='Q8040120']['operator:wikipedia'='en:Wyndham Hotels and Resorts']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for network prefixed tags
